subject: Isolate VLM enqueue transaction
description: Fix verification blocker: plain @Transactional(REQUIRED) on VlmDescriptionEnqueueService can mark the caller transaction rollback-only when repository/JPA enqueue fails even if AlertEventService catches the exception. Use an isolated transaction boundary such as REQUIRES_NEW, add/adjust regression coverage proving the primary alert path survives enqueue persistence failure, rerun focused tests and git diff --check, and record structured completion evidence.
title: Isolate VLM enqueue transaction
objective: Fix verification blocker: plain @Transactional(REQUIRED) on VlmDescriptionEnqueueService can mark the caller transaction rollback-only when repository/JPA enqueue fails even if AlertEventService catches the exception. Use an isolated transaction boundary such as REQUIRES_NEW, add/adjust regression coverage proving the primary alert path survives enqueue persistence failure, rerun focused tests and git diff --check, and record structured completion evidence.

completion_evidence.summary: Resolved rollback-only coupling by deferring VLM dispatch until primary commit and executing job persistence through a REQUIRES_NEW writer boundary.

items.summary: Seven focused VLM, alert, and event test classes passed.
items.command: cmd.exe /d /c set CI=& gradlew.bat test --tests VlmSourceSelectorTest --tests VlmDescriptionEnqueueServiceTest --tests VlmDescriptionJobWriterTest --tests AlertEventServiceTest --tests AlertBroadcastServiceTest --tests AsyncEventProcessorServiceTest --tests MqttSafetyEventSubscriberTest
